segment.source: Renders an interactive tab group in default or line style: labeled triggers with optional icons switch between rich-text panels, with a configurable default active tab. Use it for: content split into parallel categories — product details versus specs versus shipping, audience-specific instructions, per-platform setup guides, location or language variants. Prefer 'Tabbed Feature Section' when each panel pairs copy with an image, 'Tabs Navigation' to link separate pages, and 'Accordion' or 'FAQ Accordion' for stacked question-answer pairs.
